description: Small legal or official document. Written on a small, narrow slip, with annotations in the upper margin. In some ways more resembles an order of payment. At upper left there is a witness clause: شهد على ال ؟؟؟؟ في السادس . . . . . . Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
